# React Router v7 Skill

This skill was converted from [react-router-v7.mdc](https://github.com/brookslybrand/react-router-cursor-rules/blob/main/.cursor/rules/react-router-v7.mdc) cursor rules.

## Overview

The **react-router-v7** skill provides comprehensive guidance for developing React Router v7 applications following best practices and avoiding common pitfalls.

## What's Included

- **Route Type Imports**: Critical rules for importing generated route types
- **Type Generation & Workflow**: Setup and troubleshooting for TypeScript types
- **Package Guidelines**: Correct vs. incorrect package usage
- **Framework Architecture**: Route configuration, module patterns, and layouts
- **Type Safety**: Automatic type generation and type-safe URL generation with `href()`
- **Data Loading & Actions**: Server vs. client data loading patterns
- **Navigation & Links**: Basic and advanced navigation techniques
- **File Organization**: Best practices for organizing route files
- **Error Handling**: Error boundaries and error throwing
- **Advanced Patterns**: Pending UI, optimistic updates, and progressive enhancement
- **Anti-Patterns**: Common mistakes to avoid
- **Essential Rules**: Key principles for type-safe React Router v7 development
